tools.name: get_overview
tools.description: Get an overview of RZ AI Labs and its founder Amit Raz: what the practice does, his background, and notable clients.

tools.name: list_services
tools.description: List the services RZ AI Labs offers, each with a short description and a link where available.

tools.name: list_workshops
tools.description: List the AI workshops and corporate training sessions RZ AI Labs delivers, with their pages.

tools.name: get_contact
tools.description: Get the contact details and profiles for RZ AI Labs / Amit Raz (email, phone, LinkedIn, X, location).

findings.title: Lethal trifecta: untrusted input + private data + external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: get_contact · Private data: get_contact · Public sink: get_contact.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: get_contact · Private data: get_contact · Public sink: get_contact

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
